title: VanillaEnchants
description: Expand your gear with 11 lore-inspired enchantments that feel right at home in the vanilla experience. Master everything from life-stealing strikes to the secrets of the deep with unique abilities found throughout your world.
body:
# VanillaEnchants                         

  VanillaEnchants is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.x/26.1 that introduces eleven lore-friendly enchantments       
  designed to feel like part of the base game. These enchantments are fully integrated into the vanilla world,
  meaning you can find them in enchanting tables, villager trades, and stronghold chests.                      
                                                            
  ## Enchantment Details

  ### Movement and Armor
  * **Speed Walker (Boots I-III):** Increases your movement speed while walking by 10%, 20%, or 30% depending
  on the level.
  * **Leaping (Boots I-III):** Grants permanent Jump Boost I, II, or III while worn.
  * **Bioluminescence (Armor I):** Automatically emits light when you are in dark areas. The light level scales
   based on how dark the environment is.                                                                       
  * **Nightvision (Helmet I):** Grants Night Vision while you are underground (below Y level 0).               
  * **Retaliation (Chestplate I-III):** When a hit drops you below 50% of your maximum health, you gain        
  Strength I, II, or III for 5, 10, or 15 seconds respectively.                                                
   
  ### Combat (Swords and Axes)                                                                                 
  * **Bleed (Sword I-III):** Hitting living mobs (excluding undead like zombies or skeletons) causes them to
  bleed. This deals damage over time and emits blood particles.
  * **Executioner (Sword/Axe I-III):** Deals extra damage to targets that are currently below 35% of their
  maximum health.                                                                                              
  * **Lifesteal (Sword/Axe I):** When you kill a mob, you are instantly healed for 25% of that mob's maximum
  health.                                                                                                      
  * **Prosperous (Sword/Axe I-III):** Increases the amount of experience dropped by mobs when killed by 15%,
  25%, or 45%.                                                                                                 
                                                            
  ### Mining and Tools
  * **Deep Dweller (Pickaxe/Shovel I):** Increases your mining speed the further you go below Y level 0. You
  gain a 5% speed increase for every block of depth, capping at a total 40% bonus.                             
  * **Smelting (Pickaxe/Shovel/Axe/Hoe I):** Automatically converts mined drops into their smelted equivalents.
   Raw ores become ingots, ancient debris becomes netherite scrap, cobblestone becomes stone, and more
